fields.title: Replace tau Beads with event-sourced backlog
fields.description: Port backlog into tau as an internal planning system and replace tau's Beads integration. Use a git-friendly append-only event store for shared repositories so canonical tracked data lives under .pi/backlog/events/** and current issue state is derived locally into an ignored cache. Rewire tau runtime, prompts, worker instructions, footer, docs, and migration behavior away from Beads and onto backlog.
fields.design: Replace the tracked mutable issue snapshot with immutable git-tracked event files plus an ignored materialized cache. Canonical source of truth is .pi/backlog/events/**, not a tracked issues.jsonl. Replay events by timestamp then event_id, use field-level last-write-wins for concurrent same-issue edits, preserve imported issue IDs and unknown fields, and auto-import existing .beads data on first use. Public tau surface becomes backlog only: direct backlog tool plus /backlog command; no bd alias.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Tau exposes backlog as its planning system instead of Beads. Canonical tracked data is immutable event files under .pi/backlog/events/**. Local current-state cache is ignored and rebuilt as needed. Existing .beads data can be imported automatically without breaking current issue IDs. Tau-owned prompts, runtime wiring, footer, tests, and docs no longer require bd/Beads.
